title: Corporate Secretarial Manager
description:
About OA Group of Companies (OA GOC)

OA Group of Companies (OA GOC) is a regional professional services groupheadquartered in Singapore, with an expanding presence acrossMalaysia and the region. We partner with growth-minded businessowners, CFOs, and leadership teams to build strong corporatefoundations, enhance governance and compliance, and enablesustainable growth.

Ourmultidisciplinary platform spans Audit & Assurance, Accounting & Outsourcing, Corporate Secretarial & Compliance, Tax Compliance & Advisory, Business Advisory, and Digital Transformation. By integrating compliance, financial insight, and advisory thinking, we help clients move from operational stability to strategic scale.
At OA GOC, we believe that strong growth is built on professionalism, ownership, and long-term partnerships, both with our clients and our people.

Role Overview

As a Corporate Secretarial Manager, you will lead a dedicated team in providing high-quality corporate governance and secretarial services to a diverse portfolio of local and international clients. You are the bridge between regulatory requirements, and our clients’ business objectives, ensuring every entity remains in good standing while delivering proactive, strategic advice.

Key Responsibilities

1. Portfolio & Compliance Management

  • Manage a diverse portfolio of entities (Private Limiteds, LLPs, and Foreign Branches) ensuring strict adherence to the Singapore Companies Act.

  • Oversee the preparation and filing of Annual Returns, changes in directors/shareholders, and other statutory filings via BizFile+.

  • Advise clients on corporate governance best practices and regulatory updates from ACRA, IRAS, and SGX (if applicable).

2. Advisory & Transactional Support

  • Lead complex corporate exercises including incorporations, striking-off, amalgamations, and capital reductions.

  • Draft and review comprehensive board resolutions, minutes of meetings, and Constitution amendments.

  • Manage KYC and AML onboarding procedures in compliance with Singapore’s regulatory framework for Corporate Service Providers.

3. Team Leadership & Business Development

  • Mentor and supervise a team of Corporate Secretarial Associates, ensuring accuracy and professional growth.

  • Act as the primary point of contact for high-net-worth clients and MNCs, fostering long-term relationships.

  • Identify opportunities to upsell additional services (e.g., work passes, accounting, or tax) and contribute to the firm’s growth.

postedCompany.description:
OA Group of Companies: Your Gateway to a Dynamic and Fulfilling Career

At OA Group of Companies (“OA GoC”), we don’t just provide services; we craft success stories. With our two esteemed brands, Singapore Corporate Services (“SCS”) and OA Assurance (“OAA”), we are redefining excellence in assurance, compliance, and advisory services. SCS, our compliance and advisory arm, and OA Assurance, our assurance arm, work in tandem to offer comprehensive solutions to our clients.

The Core of OA GoC: Our People

At the core of OA GoC are our three dedicated partners and a vibrant team of over fifty professionals. Together, we form a formidable force in the corporate world, committed to offering tailored solutions that resonate with the unique needs of our clients. Our portfolio boasts over five hundred satisfied clients, a testament to our growing expertise and our evolution into more than just a service provider. We are partners in the truest sense, dedicated to propelling businesses forward in a dynamic corporate landscape.

Why Join OA GoC?

OA GoC isn’t just a workplace; it’s a launchpad for your professional aspirations. Here’s why you should consider joining us:

  1. Vibrant work culture: Step into an environment brimming with youth and energy. Our team’s spirit is infectious, and our workplace buzzes with ideas and innovation.
  2. Flexibility for work-life harmony: We understand the importance of balance. Our flexible working arrangements ensure you can excel at work while enjoying a fulfilling personal life.
  3. Unmatched professional growth: Propel your career with our plethora of professional development opportunities. At OA GoC, learning never stops.
  4. Supportive learning environment: Our culture of openness and collaboration makes it easy for everyone to seek guidance and support not just from the department in-charge but from any member of the team.

Be More Than Just an Employee

Join OA GoC and be part of a journey that transcends the conventional employer-employee relationship. Here, you’re not just a part of the team; you’re a vital contributor to a shared vision. We offer more than jobs – we offer careers that make a difference, bring peace of mind, and drive businesses and individuals toward their zenith.

Embark on Your Journey with OA GoC

Are you ready to be part of a team that’s shaping the future of the corporate world? At OA GoC, your career is a journey of growth, learning, and triumphs. Come, be a part of our story, and let’s forge new paths together.
